visual_description: A low-angle, close-up shot focuses on a person lying face down on a paved surface. The person is dressed in dark clothing, and their legs and feet are visible. In the background, the legs and feet of other individuals in dark trousers and shoes stand over the fallen person. The ground is wet, and a dark, possibly bloody, stain is visible near the person on the ground. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera slowly pans to the left, revealing more of the person lying on the ground, who appears to be unconscious or injured. The audio consists solely of a slow, melancholic instrumental piece. A gentle, somber melody, likely played on a string instrument, creates a pensive and serious atmosphere. The music is calm and reflective, evoking a sense of quiet tension and contemplation without any dialogue or sound effects. The camera cuts to a medium close-up of a man in a dark suit and a light-colored collared shirt. He is crouched or leaning against a wall, looking directly and intensely at the camera. His expression is one of shock or determination. The background is a blurry, out-of-focus urban environment. The white Chinese characters, "风行网," remain
